headlines.title: Cuba Bets on Solar Power as Energy Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Cuba has been experiencing a worsening energy crisis for several years, which previously led it to rely heavily on Venezuela for its fuel. Following the United States’ intervention in Venezuela in February, the energy crisis has grown even worse, as Cubans face regular blackouts
